name: Medalist Diversified, Inc.
summary: PARTI As used in this Annual Report, unless the context otherwise requires, references to we, our, us, and our company refer to Medalist Diversified,Inc., a Maryland corporation, together with our consolidated subsidiaries, including Medalist Diversified Holdings, LP, a Delaware limited partnership of which we are the sole general partner, except where it is clear from the context that the term only means Medalist Diversified,Inc.
